documentation: Pinecone is a fully managed, cloud-native vector database designed for high-performance AI applications. It allows engineers to store, search, and scale vector embeddings with ultra-low latency.
pricing: Free tier available (1 project, up to 2GB). Standard tier starts at $0.070/hr per pod. Serverless pricing is based on reads/writes and storage.
release_notes: Introduction of Serverless architecture, allowing usage-based billing without pre-provisioning pods.
